titleStmt.title: SII 31.41: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 41. (A.R. No. B 530 of 1938.) AMARĀVATI, MANGALAGIRI TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a white marble slab from Dharaṇikōṭa, now removed to the museam.
This undated inscription can be assigned to the 12th century A.D. on the basis of palaeography and internal evidences.

Incomplete. Refers to the renewal of taxes (pūrvva maryyāḍu suṅkamulu) by sunkavarggeḍe Dēvapayya on behalf of Sarvvādhikāri Jannamarāja, the subordinate of mahāpradhānam bāṇasarverggaḍa, Manavarggaḍe daṇḍanāyakam Anantapalayya. Lines 11-19 record the usual praśasti of Anantapalayya in Kannaḍa language.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samasta prasa(śa)sti sahi
taṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ bā
ṇasavorgaḍa manavarggaḍa ga(da)nḍo
nāyakaṁ Anaṁtapālayyaṁga
la tatpāda padmōpajīvi sarva
dhikāriyaina jannamarāju pa
ṁcina suṁkavorggaḍa dēvapayya rājā
ḷa pūrvamayyeḷa suṁkamularu vakuṇṟaṁ
balikiṁcikoni dharmmavu nilipiri . yi(yī) dharmma
vevvaru vighnam sasirēni (sēnirēni) mahā pātakam sēsi
navāru . svasti samadhigata paṁcamahāśabda
mahāsāmaṁtādhipati mahāpracaṇḍa daṁ
ḍanāmakaṁ vibudha varadāyakaṁ sujanaṁ
da sannanuḍiḷu matto gōtravavitra parā
ṁganāputra turiya rēvaṁta vairikṛtāṁtasā
hasōttuṁga nayyana siṁgha nāmādi sama
stapraśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ bā
ṇasaverggaḍa daṇḍanāyakaṁ A
naṁta pālayyaṁgaḷa Inscription ends
Digital edition of SII 31.41 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
